scripts.clean: node -e "for (const dir of ['.next']) require('fs').rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.clean:dev: node -e "for (const dir of ['.next-dev']) require('fs').rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.clean:all: node -e "for (const dir of ['.next', '.next-dev']) require('fs').rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true })"
